boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy STD-RAV-072-P requires closeout ledger to match invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before release. CLOSE-RAV-072 matches first four criteria but explicitly states payment release approval remains open.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Action cannot proceed. CLOSE-RAV-072 violates STD-RAV-072-P exact match requirement by stating 'payment release approval remains open'. HOLD-RAV-072 ERP hold remains visible. No source evidence supports release completion.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Action boundary remains OPEN. CLOSE-RAV-072 must reflect payment release approval completion. HOLD-RAV-072 must be cleared. No authority exists to override source-verified conditions.

critical_features_preserved: Exact source boundary match requirement from STD-RAV-072-P
Visible ERP hold status from HOLD-RAV-072
Payment release approval status from CLOSE-RAV-072 as OPEN
Invoice, vendor, and amount alignment across INV-RAV-072 and CLOSE-RAV-072
Tax review and quality signoff completion from CLOSE-RAV-072
final_answer: ESCALATE. The action may not proceed. CLOSE-RAV-072 explicitly states payment release approval remains open, which violates the exact match requirement of STD-RAV-072-P. The ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible. No repair path exists within current source records. Action boundary remains OPEN until CLOSE-RAV-072 reflects payment release approval completion and HOLD-RAV-072 is cleared.
open_blockers: Payment release approval remains open per CLOSE-RAV-072, violating STD-RAV-072-P exact match requirement.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with unresolved tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue reasons.
